---
name: Skill proposal
about: Propose a new PM skill or a substantial change to an existing one
title: "[skill] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What should the skill do?**
<!-- One paragraph. What does a PM ask for, and what do they get back? -->

**Who is it for and when does it trigger?**
<!-- The literal phrases a user would type. This becomes the frontmatter description. -->

**What is the one expert answer it encodes?**
<!-- This repo ships opinions, not menus. If the answer is "it depends", narrow the scope. -->

**Source**
<!-- Public research (link it) or your own genericized experience (say so). No proprietary IP. -->

**Overlap check**
<!-- Which existing skill is closest, and why is this not just an addition to it? -->
